title: Komrelly Mallanna Temple
tagline: Komrelly Mallanna Temple — spiritual town of Telangana

overview.short: The Komuravelli Mallanna Swamy Temple is a Hindu temple located on a hill in Komuravelli village of Siddipet district in Telangana state, India.
overview.description: The Komuravelli Mallanna Swamy Temple is a Hindu temple located on a hill in Komuravelli village of Siddipet district in Telangana state, India. It is located near Siddipet on SH–1 Rajiv Rahadari. The primary deity is Mallanna or Mallikarjuna Swamy, a form of Shiva. The deity is also called as Khandoba by the Maharashtrian people.

topPlaces.name: Cheriyal
topPlaces.description: Cheriyal (or Cherial) is a town and a municipality in Siddipet district, in the center of Telangana state in India.

topPlaces.name: Kadavergu
topPlaces.description: Kadavergu is a village located in the Cheriyal mandal of the Siddipet district of Telangana state, India. According to the 2001 census, the village had a population of 5,435.

topPlaces.name: Aknoor
topPlaces.description: Aknoor is a village panchayat in Cherial mandal in Siddipet district in the state of Telangana in south India. It was formerly in Andhra Pradesh.

items.note: Cheriyal (or Cherial) is a town and a municipality in Siddipet district, in the center of Telangana state in India.
Kadavergu is a village located in the Cheriyal mandal of the Siddipet district of Telangana state, India. According to the 2001 census, the village had a population of 5,435.
Aknoor is a village panchayat in Cherial mandal in Siddipet district in the state of Telangana in south India. It was formerly in Andhra Pradesh.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Komrelly Mallanna Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Komrelly Mallanna Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Komrelly Mallanna Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Rajiv Gandhi International Airport, Hyderabad (95 km) and the nearest railway station is Secunderabad Junction (Hyderabad) (74 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Komrelly Mallanna Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Komrelly Mallanna Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Komrelly Mallanna Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Komrelly Mallanna Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Komrelly Mallanna Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Cheriyal, Kadavergu, Aknoor.
